# Learning Baseline Mini Corpus

## Blank

| lbc-blank-001 | learning_sample_derived | Blank | Warm | Please note that the room changed to B12 for Thursday. | Room changed to B12; day is Thursday. | 78-92% |
| lbc-blank-002 | hand_crafted_edge_case | Blank | Direct |  Need a note that the survey link was fixed at 2:15 PM and replies are due Friday.  | Survey link fixed at 2:15 PM; replies due Friday. | 55-73% |
| lbc-blank-003 | hand_crafted_edge_case | Blank | Warm | Thank Aria for covering pickup yesterday and offer to take Friday. | Thank Aria; pickup was yesterday; offer Friday. | 40-60% |
